name: Pagination
description: PaginationCell (page-number button, default/hover/selected/disabled x square/full radius) and Pagination (composed bar: Basic/Group/Full-Radius variants, optional first/last + prev/next nav, optional 'Page X of Y' + per-page select).
sourceNote: Page-range logic (paginationUtils.ts, getPageRange) is genuinely computed — always shows the first/last page plus a sibling window around the current page, collapsing gaps into a single '...' token — rather than reproducing Figma's fixed 1,2,3,4,5,...,16 demo example, matching this project's precedent (DatePicker, ColorPicker). The per-page select renders a real native <select> beneath the visual chip for genuine functionality/accessibility.

advanced.description: Shows 'Page X of Y' and a per-page select
